show-ach-journal: Press {0} to open the achievement journal.
command-achievements-reset-desc: Reset achievements for yourself or for an online player.
command-achievements-reset-playerrequire: From the server console, you must specify an online player.
command-achievements-reset-notready: Player '{0}' is not fully loaded right now.
command-achievements-reset-nobehavior: Achievement data for player '{0}' is unavailable.
donateat: Enjoy playing with achievements? Please consider donating!
achievement-firstflint-desc: Gather some flint and knap your first item.
achievement-firstcopper-desc: Harvest your first copper item from a mold.
achievement-firstbronze-desc: Harvest your first bronze item from a mold.
achievement-firstiron-desc: Forge and obtain anvil from meteoric iron.
achievement-firststeel-desc: Create a steel ingot on an anvil.

Obtain any lantern.
Reward: 1 to 3x Candle.

Gather some flint and knap your first item.
Reward: 2 to 8x Obsidian stone.
achievement-firstclay-detail:
Form your first clay item.
Reward: 1x Random oil lamp.
achievement-firstcopper-detail:
Harvest your first copper item from a mold.
Reward: 5 to 40x Copper bits.
achievement-firstbronze-detail:
Harvest your first bronze item from a mold.
Reward: 20x Random bronze bits.
achievement-firstiron-detail:
Forge and obtain anvil ( metoric iron ).
Items: Meteoriciron anvil.
Reward: 1 to 3x Meteoric Iron.
achievement-firststeel-detail:

Reward: 2 to 16x Steel arrow.
achievement-makebread-detail:

Reward: 2 to 16x Cassava bread.

Eat a slice of cheese.
Reward: 1 to 2x Blue cheese (4 slices).

Kill a wolf. Both hands must be empty.
Reward: 0 to 1x Nadiyan wolftooth necklace.
achievement-goliath-detail:
Kill a bear using a stone.
Reward: 1x Random bear leg armor.
achievement-repairtranslocator-detail:
Repair a broken static translocator.
Reward: 1 to 2x Temporal gear.
achievement-flowercollector-detail:
Have 10 unique species of flower in your inventory at any time.
Reward: 1x Random large flowerpot.
achievement-killtwoheadeddrifter-detail:
Kill a double-headed drifter.
Reward: 1 to 3x Random Jonas equipment.

Have 10 berry types in your inventory.
Items: Blueberry, Cranberry, Redcurrant, Whitecurrant, Blackcurrant, Beautyberry, Blackberry, Cloudberry, Raspberry, Strawberry.
Reward: 1 to 3x Wild strawberry bush.

Have all 18 crop seed types from the game in your inventory.
Items: Carrot seeds, Flax seeds, Onion seeds, Spelt seeds, Turnip seeds, Parsnip seeds, Rice seeds, Rye seeds, Soybean seeds, Cabbage seeds, Pumpkin seeds, Pineapple seeds, Cassava seeds, Amaranth seeds, Peanut seeds, Sunflower seeds, Fennel seeds, Licorice seeds.
Reward: 5 to 30x Rusty gear.
achievement-woodcutter-detail:
Fell 100 trees.
Reward: 1x Random bronze axe.
achievement-forester-detail:
Have all 14 tree seed types in your inventory.
Items: Acacia seed, Birch seed, Kapok seed, Maple seed, Oak seed, Pine seed, Larch seed, Crimson maple seed, Redwood seed, Mediterranean cypress seed, Bald cypress seed, Ebony seed, Walnut seed, Purpleheart seed.
Reward: 1x Random wild beehive in a log.

Unlock every other achievement!
Reward: 1x Random storage vessel from 6 variants.
game:gamemechanicinfo-achievements-text:
Achievements and rewards
==============================

This mod adds an achievement journal. When an achievement is completed for the first time, it is saved to the journal, announced in chat and the player receives a one-time reward. Below is the complete current list of achievements and rewards from the server configuration.

-DejFidOFF-



Vanilla achievements
------------------------------

Stone Age
Gather some flint and knap your first item.
Reward: 2 to 8x Obsidian stone.

Potter
Form your first clay item.
Reward: 1x Random oil lamp.

Copper Age
Harvest your first copper item from a mold.
Reward: 5 to 40x Copper bits.

Bronze Age
Harvest your first bronze item from a mold.
Reward: 20x Random bronze bits.

Complex Metallurgy
Create and place an anvil.
Reward: 2 to 20x Nugget (Sphalerite).

Fancy Blacksmith
Forge and obtain anvil ( metoric iron ).
Items: Meteoriciron anvil.
Reward: 1 to 3x Meteoric Iron.

Steel Age
Create a steel ingot on an anvil.
Reward: 2 to 16x Steel arrow.

Let There Be Light!
Obtain any lantern.
Reward: 1 to 3x Candle.

Freshly Baked Bread
Bake some bread to perfection in a clay oven.
Reward: 2 to 16x Cassava bread.

Chicken Keeper
Have 128 eggs in your inventory at once.
Reward: 1 to 5x Chick.

Pack Leader
Kill a wolf. Both hands must be empty.
Reward: 0 to 1x Nadiyan wolftooth necklace.

Goliath
Kill a bear using a stone.
Reward: 1x Random bear leg armor.

Engineer
Repair a broken static translocator.
Reward: 1 to 2x Temporal gear.

Pollinator
Have 10 unique species of flower in your inventory at any time.
Reward: 1x Random large flowerpot.

Mushroom Forager
Have 8 unique mushrooms in your inventory at any time.
Reward: 1x Hand basket (papyrus).

Mushroom Forager's Paradise
Have 15 unique mushrooms in your inventory at any time.
Reward: 1x Random necklace.

Look, a Loach!
Catch your first fish with a fishing pole.
Items: Simple fishing pole (wood), Simple fishing pole (bamboo).
Reward: 1 to 16x Fish bait.

Passionate Angler
Have 15 fish species in your inventory.
Reward: 5 to 20x Rusty gear.

Extreme Angler
Have 25 fish species in your inventory.
Reward: 1x Random arctic clothing.

Sweet Reward
Manually squeeze a honeycomb.
Items: Honeycomb.
Reward: 1 to 5x Honeycomb.

Wax Magnate
Have 256 pieces of beeswax in your inventory.
Items: 256x Beeswax.
Reward: 0 to 1x Storage vessel (Honeydew).

Grain Keeper
Have every grain type in your inventory.
Items: Spelt grain, Rice grain, Flax grain, Rye grain, Amaranth grain, Sunflower grain.
Reward: 64x Rye flour.

Greengrocer
Have 7 vegetable types in your inventory.
Items: Cabbage, Olives, Carrot, Turnip, Onion, Fennel, Parsnip.
Reward: 8 to 64x Pickled cabbage.

Orchardist
Have 13 fruit types in your inventory.
Items: Red apple, Pink apple, Yellow apple, Cherry, Peach, Pear, Orange, Mango, Breadfruit, Pomegranate, Lychee, Saguaro fruit, Pineapple slices.
Reward: 0 to 1x Fruitpress.

Berry Picker
Have 10 berry types in your inventory.
Items: Blueberry, Cranberry, Redcurrant, Whitecurrant, Blackcurrant, Beautyberry, Blackberry, Cloudberry, Raspberry, Strawberry.
Reward: 1 to 3x Wild strawberry bush.

Complete Farmer
Have all 18 crop seed types from the game in your inventory.
Items: Carrot seeds, Flax seeds, Onion seeds, Spelt seeds, Turnip seeds, Parsnip seeds, Rice seeds, Rye seeds, Soybean seeds, Cabbage seeds, Pumpkin seeds, Pineapple seeds, Cassava seeds, Amaranth seeds, Peanut seeds, Sunflower seeds, Fennel seeds, Licorice seeds.
Reward: 5 to 30x Rusty gear.

Lumberjack
Fell 100 trees.
Reward: 1x Random bronze axe.

Forester
Have all 14 tree seed types in your inventory.
Items: Acacia seed, Birch seed, Kapok seed, Maple seed, Oak seed, Pine seed, Larch seed, Crimson maple seed, Redwood seed, Mediterranean cypress seed, Bald cypress seed, Ebony seed, Walnut seed, Purpleheart seed.
Reward: 1x Random wild beehive in a log.

Lovely cheese, Gromit!
Eat a slice of cheese.
Reward: 1 to 2x Blue cheese (4 slices).

Monstrosity
Kill a double-headed drifter.
Reward: 1 to 3x Random Jonas equipment.

Leatherworker
Obtain leather.
Items: Leather.
Reward: 1 to 3x Random salted hide.

She Sells Seashells
Collect all 42 seashell variants, including every color.
Reward: 10 to 50x Rusty gear.

Anteater
Eat a raw termite.
Reward: 1 to 3x Random large termite mound.

Long Fall
Die from fall damage.
Reward: 8 to 64x Feather.

With the Wind at Your Back
Craft a glider.
Reward: 0 to 1x Painting (Butterfly).

Southern Bearing
Have 16 purpleheart logs, 16 ebony logs, 16 acacia logs, 8 pineapples, 32 peanuts and 32 soybeans in your inventory.
Reward: 2 to 8x Random lily flower.

Tourist
Obtain a sturdy leather backpack.
Reward: 2 to 8x Leather block.

Completionist
Unlock every other achievement!
Reward: 1x Random storage vessel from 6 variants.

Story lore
------------------------------

Finding Guidance
Pay a trader for the location of a Treasure Hunter.
Reward: 1x Random gem.

One Man's Trash
Trade a tin bronze pickaxe for the map to the Archives.
Reward: 1x Temporal gear.

Man-Made Horrors
Defeat the Eidolon.
Reward: 1x Random Jonas part.

Whispers of Insanity
Listen to the Resonator in the Archives.
Reward: 1 to 8x Random healing poultices.

Seeking the Clues
Acquire directions to the Lazaret from a Treasure Hunter.
Reward: 4 to 16x Vintage Beef.

Hope Remains
Find the map to the village in the Lazaret.
Reward: 1x Random Nadiyan footwear.

These People Like Me
Reach Nadiya village and talk to Sedna the musician.
Reward: 1x Random tuning cylinder.

Bring it Down
Defeat the creature that guards the tower in the Devastation.
Reward: 1x Random piece of Forlorn Hope or Blackguard gear.

A Peek into Another World
Acquire the Lens from the Devastation.
Reward: 1x Rift ward.

How it Began...
Talk to Tobias in his cave.
Reward: 1x Large temporal gear.

Hydrate or Diedrate
------------------------------

Drink Water from a Bowl
I'm a civilized person, I drink my pond water from a bowl.
Reward: 1 to 3x Raw rainbow trout.

Drink Boiled Water
It's still got bits floating in it, but at least it won't make me sick.
Reward: 1 to 5x Rusty gear.

Drink Distilled Water
Now that's what I call high quality H2O.
Reward: 1 to 5x Charcoal.

Drink Rain Water
Some people feel the rain. Others just get wet.
Reward: 1 to 3x Rusty gear.

Drink Boiled Rain Water
And other people boil it for sanitary reasons.
Reward: 2 to 8x Clean bandage.

Drink Fresh Well Water
When the well's dry, we know the worth of water.
Reward: 2 to 16x Saguaro fruit.

Drink Tainted Well Water
Tastes like something died in it!
Reward: 0 to 1x Storage vessel (Rain).

Make a Well Winch
Don't wait to build a well until you're thirsty.
Reward: 1 to 10x Coil of rope.

Make a Keg
Aged to perfection.
Reward: 8 to 64x Raspberry.

Make a Fermenting Tun
*Slaps roof of tun* This baby can fit so much liquid in it.
Reward: 16 to 64x Spelt flour.

Primitive Survival
------------------------------

The Great Hunter
Eat an earthworm.
Reward: 1 to 3x Fishing Lure (Copper).

What a Jerk
Make some jerky.
Reward: 2 to 8x Bushmeat Jerky (Cooked).

It's a Trap
Make a deadfall or snare.
Reward: 1x Fish Basket.

Don't Poke The Bear
Craft wood spikes or a bed-o-nails.
Reward: 4 to 16x Stake.

Hoarder Disorder
Acquire a tree hollow.
Reward: 1x Random wooden lantern.

Up in Smoke
Truss and then smoke some meat.
Reward: 2 to 8x Cured Smoked Redmeat (raw).

My Spirit Animal
Uncover the raft easter egg.
Reward: 2 to 16x Cordage.

There's a Snake in my Boot
Kill a snake.
Reward: 2 to 6x Snake Meat (Cooked).

Crabby Patty
Murder a crab.
Reward: 2 to 6x Crab Meat (Cooked).

Super Pooper
Break a block of worm castings.
Reward: 2 to 16x Earthworm Castings.

Distinguished Seraph
Eat some caviar.
Reward: 2 to 4x Rusty gear.

Pyrotechnician
Craft a firework.
Reward: 2 to 8x Fuse (black match).

Bug Catcher
Catch some fireflies in a jar.
Reward: 1x Bug net.

Re-Animator
Acquire a skull or hand of the dead.
Reward: 1x Random mask.

AllClasses
------------------------------

Field Medic
Obtain a Grass-flower poultice.
Reward: 1 to 5x Alcohol-soaked bandage.

High Class
Have a Large LV Handbag (Backpack) in your inventory.
Reward: 1x Random necklace.

Locust Tamer
Obtain a Tuning Spear.
Reward: 1 to 3x Insect amber.

Light Into the Depths
Have a Mining lantern in your inventory.
Reward: 1 to 3x Empty Brass Torch holder.

Sifter
Have a Copper Prospector's metal pan, Tinbronze Prospector's metal pan and Iron Prospector's metal pan in your inventory.
Reward: 2 to 16x Powdered sylvite.

Master of Fertility
Obtain a Quality soil booster.
Reward: 8 to 64x Compost.

Repair Master
Have Basic tools, Simple tools, Standard tools and Advanced tools in your inventory.
Reward: 1x Random waist clothing.

Masterchef
Have a Copper Metal Cooking Pot, Bismuthbronze Metal Cooking Pot, Iron Metal Cooking Pot, Meteoric iron metal Cooking Pot, Steel Metal Cooking Pot and Gold plated cooking pot in your inventory.
Reward: 2 to 20x Rusty gear.
